creator: shawn.webb@hardenedbsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #9)
While I don't have the original laptop anymore, I do have another Dell Precision 7680 wherein the trackpad/touchpad is wholly nonfunctional. I need to file a separate bug report for the keyboard, which becomes nonresponsive in a not-so-easily-reproducible (or convenient!) manner.

Would you like me to post the relevant info for the trackpad on the new Precision 7680? If so, I can get that to you sometime in the next week.
